description: Product Description New Product vLinker FD Series - a Portable Wireless Bluetooth OBD2 Scanner, a Powerful Vehicle Diagnostic Tool What is vLinker FD Series obd2 scanner? ( Version: Bluetooth3.0 ) I: An all-in-one diagnostic scan tool: vLinker FD obd2 scanner is a Portable Wireless Bluetooth Automotive Diagnostic Device. The car scanner can support thousands of different third-party apps, which means it will work for American, Asian, and European cars made after 1996 which supports EOBD/OBD2 protocols . You can use it to read and erase car error codes and reset the system. Provide you more options to meet your needs! II: A professional Bluetooth OBD2 Scanner: Traditional diagnostic scan tools are equipped with diagnostic cables and you have to connect the car scanner with the OBDII port via cable during the diagnosis, which limits the diagnostic distance within 1m. While the vLinker FD scan tool offers a wireless connection, making it convenient and efficient during work. III: A portable, economical vehicle fault diagnosis tool: it's suitable for DIY personal users and small repair shops. vLinker FD Diagnostics + APP can now work. It is connected to the vehicle diagnostic seat through the connector and wirelessly communicates with a smartphone or tablet via Bluetooth so that the client software and diagnostic software can be installed on the smart terminal to diagnose the automobile fault. Note: Please check it first with vLinker team if you cannot sure the vehicle compatibility. A Professional Car All Systems Diagnostic OBD2 Scanner Tool. 🟢vLinker FD Series professional car scanners can support all available electronic control modules, such as check engine system, ABS system, SRS system, SAS system, Suspension system, Instrument system, BCM system, Air Conditioning system, Transmission system, Steering system, Dash Broard system, Battery Charging system, D PF system, TPMS system and etc. 🟢Additionally, the vLinker FD Series car diagnostic scanner for all cars is able to read and reset fault codes, retrieve ECU information for all available systems. (Depending on which third-party APP you choose) vLinker FD Bluetooth OBD2 Diagnostic Scanner For Android - Recommended by FORScan. 🟢 At present, the vLinker FD Bluetooth3.0 version supports all functions o f FORScan Lit e APP , such as reading fault code, clearing fault code, reading data stream, reset module, brush hiding, ECU programming . 🟢BatterySaver I: Thanks to the unique BatterySaver technology you can rest assured that, vLinker FD won't drain your battery if you leave it plugged in. II: Operating Current is 51 mA, automatic sleep in idle state, sleep current is as low as 3mA. 🟢Wider Car Compatibility I: vLinker FD Bluetooth3.0 works with all 1996 and newer 12V petrol cars compatible with standard OBD2 protocols, and all 1996 and newer 12V small diesel vehicles with a load of 6.5T or less supporting the OBD2 protocols. Do not use on a 2.24V power diesel car. II: The v Linker FD Bluetooth3.0 proprietary connection algorithm enables FD to connect to more makes and models. 🟢More Mainstream Apps I: APPs: FORScan Lite, TORQUE Lite/Pro, JScan, OBD Fusion, DashCommand, Car Scanner ELM OBD2, BimmerCode, BimmerLink, inCarDoc, etc. II: There are more apps waiting to be explored. Works with more 3rd party apps & software. 🟢TIPS: For third-party application s (free and paid versions ), Customers choose according to their own needs . Why should we choose vLinker FD Bluetooth3.0? This pocket-size obd2 bluetooth3.0 code reader won't obstruct driver legroom and features unparalleled performance, intelligent sleep mode, exceptional third party app support. Compared with the iCar Pro series, the vLinker FD series has any improvement? 1. USART data buffer up to 2K bytes , baud rate increased to 230.4Kbps . Faster, more reliable, and more feature-rich than its predecessors. 2. Not only supports fully compatible ELM327 AT commands, but also compatible with ELM329 AT commands. 3. OBD request byte up to 1024 bytes , can meet the needs of some special long frame communication. 4. Supports battery voltage drop, OBD bus active, etc. Up to 3 ways to wake up from sleep mode. 5. Over-voltage, over-current, over-temperature and battery drain protection. 6. TP transmission protocol, Ensure wireless communication security. 7. Superior compatibility-works with more 3rd party apps & software. How to Update vLinker FD Series Firmware? Step1: Download "VgateFwUpdater APP" , scan the QR code on the product package. Step2: Open the APP, select “SCAN” and scan the QR code on the product package again . Step3: According to the product model, select the entrance "WIFI" or "BT-BLE" , click "DOWNLOAD". Step4: Wait for the download status to be updated to "Succeeded" . #TIPS# 🟢 Note1: About "VgateFwUpdater" AP P Users can search "VgateFwUpdater" in the APP Store. When you need to upgrade the firmware, you need to download it. Otherwise, the product can work normally without downloading. (The purpose of opening upgradable functions of the product is to meet customers' needs in this regard) 🟢 Note2: About the security of "VgateFwUpdater" AP P Users do not need to register or fill in any information. The APP is very simple. It only provides customers with download and upgrade resource packages for the convenience of customers with upgrade needs. Please rest assured that we will not collect any customer information. Note: Pirated products cannot be upgraded. vLinker FD+ Bluetooth 4.0 Code Reader vLinker FD Bluetooth 3.0 Code Reader vLinker FD Wi-Fi Code Reader Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.4 out of 5 stars 265 4.4 out of 5 stars 265 3.9 out of 5 stars 11 Price £40.47 £ 40 . 47 £34.99 £ 34 . 99 — no data Supports all OBD-II protocols ✓ ✓ ✓ Works with all Android devices ✓ ✓ ✓ Works with all Apple (iOS) devices ✓ no data ✓ Recommended App for Android System(Fee depends on app) FORScan Lite, TORQUE Lite/Pro, JScan, OBD Fusion, DashCommand, Car Scanner ELM OBD2, BimmerCode, BimmerLink, inCarDoc, etc. FORScan Lite, TORQUE Lite/Pro, JScan, OBD Fusion, DashCommand, Car Scanner ELM OBD2, BimmerCode, BimmerLink, inCarDoc, etc. FORScan Lite, TORQUE Lite/Pro, JScan, OBD Fusion, DashCommand, Car Scanner ELM OBD2, BimmerCode, BimmerLink, inCarDoc, etc. Recommended App for iOS System(Fee depends on app) FORScan Lite, TORQUE Lite/Pro, JScan, OBD Fusion, DashCommand, Car Scanner ELM OBD2, BimmerCode, BimmerLink, inCarDoc, etc. no data FORScan Lite, TORQUE Lite/Pro, JScan, OBD Fusion, DashCommand, Car Scanner ELM OBD2, BimmerCode, BimmerLink, inCarDoc, etc. Recommended App for Windows(Fee depends on app) FORScan for Windows FORScan for Windows FORScan for Windows BatterySaver sleep mode ✓ ✓ ✓
